capabilities: Combine modular architecture with task decomposition to streamline processes and improve system adaptability.

procedure.action: Analyze system components using Domain Driven Design to identify bounded contexts using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Execute Task Decomposition to break down complex tasks into smaller, manageable units by executing the transformation function on each input record; assert output_schema_valid = true and error_count < 1; log transformation_duration_ms.

Invoke the Aggregator Pattern to merge outputs from decomposed tasks into cohesive modules by invoking the target API with the specified parameters; assert response_status < 400 and response_time_ms < 5000; log request_id and response_code.

Assert merged modules with automated tests ensuring functional integrity by asserting all required fields conform to the schema definition; emit VALIDATION_FAILED with field path on the first failing field; assert field_validation_pass_rate >= 1.0.

Assign and document results using Structured Logging for traceability and future reference using a deterministic decision matrix: evaluate each criterion in priority order; assign first matching class or UNCLASSIFIED; assert confidence_score >= 0.7 for all classified records.

summary: Integrate modular architecture principles with task decomposition to enhance system flexibility and maintainability by aligning workflows and merging shared steps.
title: Modular Architecture with Task Decomposition

failureConditions: Increased complexity due to poorly defined task boundaries.

Integration issues from incompatible module interfaces; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
Loss of traceability in task execution; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: merged modules with automated tests ensuring functional integrity by asserting all required fields conform to the schema
successConditions: Check if all modules pass integration tests post-composition; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Ensure task decomposition aligns with identified bounded contexts; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Verify traceability through comprehensive logging; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
